cheshta.citation: BPHS Shadbala Adhyaya — Cheshtabala (motional state from true speed).

dig.citation: BPHS Shadbala Adhyaya — Digbala (linear taper, 60 Virupas at strong cusp).

drik.citation: BPHS Shadbala Adhyaya — Drikbala (benefic - malefic drishti / 4).

hora.citation: BPHS Kalabala — Horabala (hora-lord from sunrise, 60 Virupas).

paksha.citation: BPHS Kalabala — Pakshabala (lunar phase; Moon doubled).

tribhaga.citation: BPHS Kalabala — Tribhagabala (thirds of day/night; Jupiter always).

yuddha.note: War-outcome strength transfer not modelled; 0 Virupas pending a rigorous war model.
